name: Skyharbour Resources Ltd.
description: Skyharbour Resources Ltd. is a Canadian-based uranium exploration company focused on the Athabasca Basin in Saskatchewan. The company holds an extensive portfolio of uranium projects, including its high-grade, co-flagship Moore Lake and Russell Lake properties. Skyharbour employs a dual-track business model: advancing its core assets through exploration and drilling, while utilizing a prospect generator strategy to partner with other companies to explore its secondary properties. This approach allows the company to capitalize on strengthening uranium market fundamentals while maintaining a large, diversified land position in one of the world's most prolific uranium-producing regions.
